Session-centered workflow

Run the solver without touching the CLI.

Upload telemetry, compare multiple sessions, or solve from a saved track profile. The UI keeps the first step obvious and moves the engineering detail deeper into the flow.

Choose a workflow

One app, three starting points. The defaults stay light and racer-focused.

Core Inputs

Only the essentials stay exposed up front.

Upload one telemetry file for a diagnosis-driven solve.
Select two or more sessions to rank and synthesize.
